problems.title: Print the Evens
problems.statement: Read two integers, start and end (one per line), and print all even integers from start to end, both included, separated by single spaces on one line. If there are none, print nothing.
constraints: Exact spacing between numbers doesn't matter — we just check the numbers you print, in order.

problems.title: Stars in Our Eyes
problems.statement: Read an integer n and print n lines. Line i (starting at 1) should contain i stars separated by spaces.
constraints: Exact spacing doesn't matter — we check the stars on each line, in order.
problems.starterCode:
n = int(input())
# print the pattern described above

problems.title: Triangle Magic
problems.statement: Read an integer n and print a number triangle: row i (starting at 1) contains the number i repeated i times.
constraints: Exact spacing/indentation doesn't matter — we only check the numbers on each line, in order.
problems.starterCode:
n = int(input())
# print the number triangle described above
